violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Insides of all equipment in need of cleaning. Coolers/ drawers/ microwaves/ refrigerators/ etc.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Outsides of all equipment in need of cleaning. Coolers/ drawers/ microwaves/ refrigerators/ etc.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Several filters under hood in need of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors throughout kitchen, under equipment in need of more thorough cleaning.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - General cleanliness (doors, handles, shelves, clean in place grills and cooktops) of equipment.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice machine requires a thorough cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item * was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Single service items / to go items stored in the basement. The basement does not have a covered ceiling, just the floor joists and wood flooring from above.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors require more attention to detail.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. - Rear doors has an air gap at the bottom and the top of the door.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Mop not hung to drip and dry.
